questions.question_text: You want to use the shortcut and continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You are driving at 40 km/h and must continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You have reduced speed in order to turn right at the intersection. What do you do?
You are driving at about 50 km/h and must continue straight ahead at the intersection. You have caught up with the braking red car. What do you do?
You are driving at 30 to 40 km/h and must continue straight ahead. There is no traffic behind you. What do you do?
You are driving at 20 to 30 km/h. What do you do?
You are driving at 30 km/h in a built-up area. What should you pay particular attention to here?
You are entering a built-up area and need to continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You want to turn right as soon as possible. There is no traffic in your blind spots. What do you do?
You are driving at 50 km/h and are about to overtake the lorry on your right. What do you do?
You are driving at 60 to 70 km/h and must continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You are driving at about 60 km/h and want to enter the motorway to the left. There is no traffic in your blind spot. What do you do?
You are driving at about 70 km/h. What do you do?
You are driving at 60 to 70 km/h. What do you do?
You are going to turn right here. There are no cyclists behind you on the cycle path. What do you do?
The oncoming lorry has just appeared. What do you do?
You are driving at 80 km/h and must continue straight ahead. What do you do?
You are driving at about 70 km/h. What do you do?
You want to turn right at this intersection. There are no cyclists or pedestrians behind you on the cycle path. What do you do?
You want to turn right at this intersection. The lane to the left is clear and there are no cyclists behind you. What do you do?
You want to turn right at the intersection. There is no traffic behind you. What do you do?
You want to turn left at this intersection. What should you pay particular attention to?
The driver has got out of the grey car here. Which rules apply here?

answers.1: I may leave the car here for up to 3 minutes.

questions.question_text: When is the driver responsible for making sure passengers are wearing seat belts?
What should you pay particular attention to a little further ahead?
